verdict: T1.2 (A3-v2) token-level Meluhha co-occurrence: of 102 position-matched PNs (tight renderings), 0 have a >=3-segment contiguous match in at least one of the 180 Meluhha-mentioning tablets. Zero substantive co-occurrences. Either (a) Phase-29 candidates are not Meluhhan names, or (b) the corpus does not contain them, or (c) the matcher needs further relaxation.
